data.title: Cibus, Inc. Announces Pricing of Public Offering of Class A Common Stock
data.description: On March 26, 2026, agricultural technology firm Cibus, Inc. (Nasdaq: CBUS) revealed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering. The offering consists of 6,976,744 shares of its Class A Common Stock at a purchase price of $2.15 per share. Cibus is a leading company in developing and licensing plant traits to seed companies.

data.title: Modular Flooring Market worth $16.48 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on March 26, 2026, it was reported that the Modular Flooring Market, as per MarketsandMarkets analysis, is segmented by Product Type (LVT, Ceramic, Rubber, Polyolefin), Installation Technique (Interlocking, Loose Lay), End-use (Household, Workplace, Healthcare, Education, Retail), and Region. Key figures and trends from the report indicate significant growth potential in the modular flooring sector, with a focus on various product types and installation techniques suitable for different end-use applications across regions.

data.title: VR Completes Bonding Process for NOI Drill Permit for its New Boston Moly-Tungsten-Copper-Silver Porphyry Project in Nevada
data.description: Vancouver-based company VR Resources Limited, listed on TSX.V as VRR, FSE as 5VR0, and OTCQB as VRRCF, has successfully finalized the reclamation bonding process with the Nevada Bureau of Land Management for its New Boston project. This allows for the commencement of a spring drill program after securing the Notice of Intent drill permit for the moly-tungsten-copper-silver porphyry site in Nevada. The company is now in the process of planning the upcoming drill program.

data.title: Initial findings for fiscal year ending Dec 31, 2025, reveal promising numbers.
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, reflecting a positive trend in the job market. The number of new jobs added in the past month reached 250,000, surpassing analysts' expectations. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was recorded at 6.2%, showcasing a robust economy. These figures indicate a promising outlook for the labor market and overall economic stability.
2025 Universal Registration Document by BIC released for public access. Available now.

data.title: TransUnion Announces Earnings Release Date for First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) is set to release its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The press release is scheduled for 6:00 a.m. CT on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, followed by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. CT on the same day to review the results. This information will be accessible on the TransUnion Investor Relations website at http://www.transunion.com/tru.

data.title: Bain & Company announces expansion of lead global management consulting partnership with Palantir to bring world industry-leading AI transformation capabilities to clients
data.description: Bain & Company has revealed its plans to enhance collaboration with Palantir, catering to the increasing demand for AI solutions. This collaboration extension will provide client companies with increased access to the joint expertise of Bain and Palantir. The initiative, effective from March 26, 2026, aims to accelerate AI-powered impact for businesses. The partnership between Bain & Company and Palantir is set to offer specialized services in managing and leveraging data analytics for businesses in Boston and Miami, ensuring growth and efficiency. This move comes as both companies witness a surge in demand for advanced AI solutions, indicating a positive outlook for the firms involved.

data.title: Freightos Files Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain, on March 26, 2026, Freightos Limited (NASDAQ: CRGO), a top vendor-neutral global platform for freight pricing, booking, and procurement, revealed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the period concluding on December 31, 2025. This submission was made to the U.S. authorities.

data.title: Ping An Reports 2025 Performance on Positive Trends, Operating Profit[1] Up 10.3% YoY
data.description: Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd. has reported a significant milestone by increasing its cash dividend for the 14th consecutive year to RMB48,891 million. This announcement was made in Hong Kong and Shanghai on March 26, 2026. Ping An, listed as HKEX: 2318 and SSE: 601318, disclosed its financial results for the year indicating positive growth and stability in its operations.

data.title: AAVE price correction may hit $99-103 support before bouncing back to $113-120 resistance levels from current $106.76.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aave (AAVE) is currently priced at $106.76, showing bearish signals according to market analysts. Technical analysis indicates a possible dip to the support levels of $99-103 before a potential rebound towards resistance levels of $113-120.

data.title: Designer Brands Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: For the third quarter in a row, there has been a consistent increase in comparable sales and net sales. The fourth quarter saw a 280 basis point year-over-year growth in consolidated gross margin. The full-year adjusted operating income surpassed the high end of the guidance significantly. The guidance for 2026 indicates a substantial improvement in performance.

data.title: CMC Reports Second Quarter of Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: In the second quarter, the company reported a net profit of $93.0 million, equivalent to $0.83 per diluted share, and adjusted earnings of $130.1 million, or $1.16 per diluted share. The consolidated core EBITDA for the quarter hit $297.5 million, marking a significant growth of about 114% compared to the previous year, attributed to strong execution and performance.

data.title: JBT Marel Corporation to Host 2026 Investor Day Today
data.description: JBT Marel Corporation, a prominent global technology solutions provider for the food & beverage industry, is set to hold an Investor Day in New York City on Thursday, March 26, 2026. The event will commence at 9:00 AM ET / 1:00 PM GMT and is scheduled to wrap up around 12:15 PM ET / 4:15 PM GMT. CEO Brian Deck and key executives will be presenting at the event. JBT Marel is listed on the NYSE and Nasdaq Iceland under the ticker symbol JBTM.
Managers' transactions reported: Key updates on insider trading typically shared.

data.title: Carmanah Announces Proposed Name Change to Skull Ridge Gold Corp. Rebrands Flagship Asset to the Skull Island Project in Newfoundland
data.description: Vancouver, BC - On March 26, 2026, Carmanah Minerals Corp. (CSE: CARM) revealed plans to rebrand as Skull Ridge Gold Corp., pending Board of Directors' approval, completion of necessary paperwork with corporate and regulatory bodies, and submission of essential documents to the Canadian Securities Exchange. The company's transition to its new corporate name signifies a strategic shift in its brand identity.

data.title: AngloGold Ashanti Publishes Its 2025 UK Annual Report, Form 20-F, Other Annual Reports and 2026 AGM Notice
data.description: On Thursday, March 26, 2026, in London, Denver, and Johannesburg, the Company released important financial information for the year ending December 31, 2025. This includes the 2025 UK Annual Report containing audited consolidated financial statements, the 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F, the 2025 Sustainability Report, and the 2025 Mineral Resource and Mineral Reserve Report - collectively referred to as the "2025 reports." Additionally, the Company issued a Notice of 2026 Annual General Meeting.

data.title: LDO facing $0.28 support test, bears eye $0.25 target. Short-term: $0.25-$0.28, Medium-term: $0.22-$0.32, Bullish breakout: $0.31.
data.description: Summary of LDO Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the price target is estimated to be between $0.25 and $0.28. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast range is projected to be from $0.22 to $0.32. A bullish breakout is expected if the price surpasses $0.31, while maintaining critical support at $0.28.

data.title: BOSS Zhipin Repurchases 748,460 Shares; Total Repurchases Amount to Over RMB480 Million in 2026
data.description: On March 25, 2026, KANZHUN LIMITED, also known as "BOSS Zhipin," repurchased 748,460 ordinary shares, spending approximately RMB34.4 million. So far in 2026, the Company has used over RMB480 million for share buybacks, demonstrating a strong dedication to enhancing shareholder returns. The Company's shares are traded on Nasdaq under the symbol BZ and on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as 2076.

data.title: EnviroGold Defines Commercialization Strategy to Build a Scalable Multi-Jurisdictional “Metals Without Mining” Project Execution Platform
data.description: EnviroGold has introduced the Rapid Deployment Pathway, a flexible approach to accelerate tailings projects towards generating revenue. This model aims to speed up the validation, contract negotiation, and deployment processes. Through this approach, EnviroGold aims to swiftly transition these projects into revenue-generating ventures.

data.title: Statement from Michael Rousseau, President and Chief Executive Officer of Air Canada
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Montreal, Michael Rousseau, the President and Chief Executive Officer of Air Canada, issued a statement.
